name: testmu-browser-agent
description: AI-native browser automation CLI and MCP server for Chrome. Use to navigate websites, fill forms, extract data, take screenshots, and test web applications. Supports local Chrome and LambdaTest cloud.
instructions: See AGENTS.md for full development and usage instructions. This is a Go project using cobra CLI and go-rod for CDP. The core browser automation loop is: open a page → snapshot the accessibility tree (gets @ref IDs) → act on elements by ref → verify. Run 'testmu-browser-agent mcp' to start the MCP server with 10 browser tools. Run 'testmu-browser-agent snapshot' after every navigation to get fresh element refs before interacting.
